Steps: Observe header, navigation, content, and footer
Expected Result: Main page sections are visible and aligned

Scenario: Verify login page can be opened
Steps: Click Login / navigate to login page
Expected Result: Login page opens with username and password fields

Scenario: Verify user can login with valid credentials
Expected Result: User is authenticated and dashboard is displayed

Scenario: Verify invalid login does not allow access
Expected Result: Error message appears; user remains unauthenticated
Each page opens without broken links

Scenario: Verify search field is visible and usable
Steps: Click search field and type a keyword
Expected Result: Search input accepts text and returns/filters results

Scenario: Verify a main record can be created
Steps: Open add form, enter mandatory fields, save
Expected Result: Record saves successfully and appears in list

Scenario: Verify an existing record can be edited
Steps: Open edit page, update value, save
Expected Result: Updated value is stored and displayed

Scenario: Verify a record can be deleted with confirmation
Expected Result: Record is removed or marked deleted as designed

Steps: Submit form with mandatory fields blank
Expected Result: Validation errors appear and form is not submitted
Session ends and user is returned to login/home page

Scenario: Verify restricted page cannot be opened after logout
Expected Result: User is redirected to login or access denied page

Scenario: Verify application loads in supported browsers
Expected Result: Core pages render and function correctly

Scenario: Verify no major console/server errors occur during critical flow
Steps: Perform launch, login, navigation, create, edit, logout
